mapper.sql: id, channel_code, display_name, description, sort_order, enabled, client_visible, note, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM app_payment_channel_config ORDER BY sort_order ASC, id ASC
SELECT FROM app_payment_channel_config WHERE channel_code = #{channelCode} LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE app_payment_channel_config SET display_name = #{displayName}, description = #{description}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, enabled = #{enabled}, client_visible = #{clientVisible}, note = #{note}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
